semantic.role: Vitest test suite validating forced processing behavior of ArchSpine tasks under repair policy conditions.
responsibilities: Sets up temporary directories and mocks for isolated test execution.
Tests the forced processing behavior of ASTExtractionTask and SummarizationTask under repair policy conditions.
Validates task execution and state transitions when forced processing is triggered.
Cleans up test artifacts after each test case.
outOfScope: Integration with external APIs or services.
invariants: File is a Vitest test suite (.test.ts).
Uses isolated temporary directories for each test.
Restores all mocks and cleans up artifacts after each test case.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Validate the correctness and robustness of the forced processing feature within the ArchSpine task system.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Minor updates or refinements to test logic (commit 'easy' is non-specific).
